name: hdr_zscale_tonemap_to_sdr
description: HDR (HDR10 / BT.2020 / PQ) → SDR (BT.709 / gamma) tonemap via libzimg. The reference HDR-down-conversion pipeline — required for any deliverable that goes from a UHD HDR master to a standard-range output.
blockers: libzimg-build (zscale needs libzimg linked into FFmpeg — separate from libswscale)
hdr-color-metadata-on-encoder (§2.4 'Color metadata on encoder' / 'HDR10 mastering display' rows)
roadmap_refs: §2.4 'HDR10 mastering display + content light level' row
§3.3 step 7 'Color metadata, HDR10 static metadata, Dolby Vision RPU passthrough'
